about.body: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Hyderabad, Pakistan, specializing in MERN stack, Next.js, React Native, and AI integrations. I build high-performance web and mobile applications that look stunning and convert visitors into clients.
about.body2: Co-founder of Xovato, a digital agency delivering premium web solutions to clients across the US, Australia, and beyond. I prioritize clean code, pixel-perfect UI, and measurable results.
